The '''Sulphis system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arrakan]].<ref name="Flight of the Jedi" />

{{System-stub}}
